projectDescription: A free, browser-based color palette generator with color theory relationships, accessibility tools, and export to code and design app formats.
keyFeatures: Color theory palette generation (complementary, analogous, triadic, tetradic, split-complementary, monochromatic)
Lock colors to keep them while rerolling others
Copy colors in 6 formats: hex, RGB, HSL, CSS variable, Tailwind, SCSS
Export to code formats (CSS, JSON, Tailwind, SCSS) and art app formats (ASE, ACO, GPL, Procreate, Paint.NET)
WCAG 2.1 contrast checker with AA/AAA/AA18 compliance levels
Color blindness simulation (deuteranopia, protanopia, tritanopia, achromatopsia)
Color naming from 4,000+ entry database using Oklab perceptual distance
Gradient generator with linear gradients and multiple export formats
Extract dominant colors from images using k-means clustering
Full-screen palette preview with UI mockup and typography modes
Color variations (tints, shades, tones) for any palette color
Full keyboard control — every action has a shortcut
Save palettes with tags and collections in localStorage
Undo/redo history with session palette timeline
8 quick palette presets (pastel, neon, earth, jewel, monochrome, warm, cool, muted)
Up to 10 colors per palette (vs. competitors' 5-color free limit)
No accounts, no server, no analytics — everything runs in the browser
publicApiSurface: generateRelatedColor(referenceColors, relationship, fallbackColor) — generate a color using a color theory relationship
generatePresetPalette(preset, count) — generate a palette from a named preset
calculateHarmonyScore(colors) — score palette harmony with relationship detection
formatColor(hex, format, varName) — format a hex color in hex/rgb/hsl/css-var/tailwind/scss
hexToHsl(hex) / hslToHex(hsl) — convert between hex and HSL
hexToRgb(hex) — convert hex to RGB
hexToOklab(hex) / hexToOklch(hex) / oklchToHex(oklch) — convert to/from Oklab/Oklch perceptual color spaces
contrastRatio(hex1, hex2) — WCAG 2.1 contrast ratio
wcagLevel(ratio) — WCAG compliance level (aaa/aa/aa18/fail)
relativeLuminance(hex) — WCAG 2.1 relative luminance
generateTints(hex, count) / generateShades(hex, count) / generateTones(hex, count) — color variations
exportPalette(colors, format) — export palette in code or art app format
savePalette(colors, name, tags, collection) — save palette to localStorage
getSavedPalettes() — retrieve saved palettes from localStorage
COLOR_RELATIONSHIPS — array of color relationship definitions
PALETTE_PRESETS — array of palette preset definitions
COLOR_FORMATS — array of copy format definitions
EXPORT_FORMATS — array of export format definitions
APP_INFO — array of art app import instructions
SHORTCUT_GROUPS — grouped keyboard shortcut definitions
